cobblemon.species.gardevoir-sylvevoir.de: A fusion of Gardevoir and Sylveon with heightened Fairy power.
cobblemon.species.gardevoir-umbrevoir.de: A fusion of Gardevoir and Umbreon with sharpened Dark power.
cobblemon.species.gardevoir-espevoir.des: A fusion of Gardevoir and Espeon with heightened psychic power.
cobblemon.species.gardevoir-flarevoir.de: A fusion of Gardevoir and Flareon with blazing fire power.
cobblemon.species.gardevoir-vaporevoir.d: A fusion of Gardevoir and Vaporeon with surging water power.
cobblemon.species.gardevoir-glacevoir.de: A fusion of Gardevoir and Glaceon with heightened ice power.
cobblemon.species.gardevoir-leafevoir.de: A fusion of Gardevoir and Leafeon with strengthened grass power.
cobblemon.species.gardevoir-joltevoir.de: A fusion of Gardevoir and Jolteon with crackling electric power.
cobblemon.species.aegislash-aegievoir.de: A defensive fusion of Aegislash and Gardevoir in shield form.
cobblemon.species.arceus-arcevoir.desc: A fusion of Arceus and Gardevoir that shifts with divine plate power.
cobblemon.species.rayquaza-rayevoir.desc: A fusion of Rayquaza and Gardevoir that coils psychic grace around draconic might.
cobblemon.species.gardevoir-queen.desc: Gardevoir's Queen form, regal and ruinous in equal measure.
cobblemon.species.scizor-darkzor.desc: A fusion of Scizor and Darkrai with nightmare-black claws.
